3248000.name: Flint Demo
3248000.description:
Dare or Die!

This is Flint, an Action Adventure game in which you fight monsters using every available tool to your advantage. You are the only one who can stop The Golden Oath from controlling the entire world, wake up and get to work, with multiple swords at your disposal, prove yourself worthy in the Asylum and face off against Rafael, The Crestfallen to test if you're even worthy to take on the perilous journey ahead of you.

Swap between weapons and potions with the Hot-Cycle and use every single item in your inventory to win the fight as quickly as possible, dance with the enemy and dodge incoming attacks in a quick recoverable burst of speed. Low on health? Use a potion but watch out, for it will leave you vulnerable. 

Enemies like the creepy lurking invaders will leave you feeling unsafe, the Serfs will keep you on your toes, and the rampaging bulls will send you flying in the other direction, are you tough enough to take on the Rulers of the Earth?

Learn the Lore by talking to various NPCs in the humble town of Siedlung to get a better understanding of just what you're doing here, and why.

This demo contains the entire first Act of Flint and serves as a preamble to the mighty story that awaits in the full game, over an Hour of exciting, action-packed content as an appetizer.

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
